description: Local HTML and JSON-based DMS Implementing Agent knowledge system.

agents.name: DMS Proposal Preparation Agent
agents.purpose: Prepare bid proposals from TORs, RFQs, RFPs and previous proposals.

agents.name: DMS Project Governance Agent
agents.purpose: Create project implementation and governance documentation.

agents.name: DMS Document Review Agent
agents.purpose: Review documents for compliance, gaps and audit readiness.

agents.name: DMS Workflow Agent
agents.purpose: Design workflows for implementation in the DMS InTouch module.

folders.source_documents: Stores TORs, proposals, legislation, DMS manuals and client policies.
